textByHash.ab222f3237365cdcef29d877b7075558eab7fc96: Cannot wake up... Where am I?
textByHash.2fb0ed0db05bd07bb70fad10004f13005ed2519c: What did I write down now? Put it in the knot hole.
textByHash.348bcbe137bd6bcce4cbe894673380324e3573d3: Oh, I understand you! At last, someone who doesn't just mumble. I understand what you're saying!
textByHash.6a4d5f788c7011ec9b86f89c4cfcde02dac3a100: Why you poor fellow, have you passed away and you want to send a message back to a loved one?
textByHash.4a772827b0378247d19d076c8ea2d54f6657395f: You have come to haunt my dreams until I pass on your message to a dearly loved one. I understand. Pray, tell me who would you like me to pass a message on to?
textByHash.daf27b0b772cdca423fab22f915d1eb690ca2c21: Don't be silly now! That in no way reflects the truth!
textByHash.e538fc22d284616b7cff79f950caa37d332acb36: What?! Don't be preposterous! I'm not a ghost! How could you say something like that?
textByHash.60cd1a51fbeffc0c51d2d922a52b6cde203a0eeb: Don't be silly, I can see you, I can see that tree. If I were dead, I wouldn't be able to see anything.. What you say just doesn't reflect the truth. You'll have to try harder to pull one over on me!
textByHash.45d69db3cb432318a27ea3291fa4c342c1070630: Oh, it's quite.... Oh... Trying to catch me out were you! Anyone can clearly see that I am not a ghost!
textByHash.9c539a85fa77f8ec3042e889f3a9b4bf79cd9b58: No I won't take offence because I'm not dead and I'm afraid you'll have to come up with some pretty conclusive proof before I believe it. What a strange dream this is.
textByHash.cbf88edbabf33a1e6eaf5bcc26a36f6451ccd4ec: Oh, hello there, do you still think I'm dead? It's hard to see how I could be dead when I'm still in the world. I can see everything quite clearly. And nothing of what you say reflects the truth.
textByHash.a3cabe17ad81cb4faba231859828a58cb1296a28: Well, that is the most peculiar thing I've ever experienced. This mirror must somehow be dysfunctional. Strange how well it reflects the stagnant swamp behind me, but there is nothing of my own
textByHash.33446ff66b066cd0df20a26c18fd51a7ced3c058: I think you might be right my friend, though I still feel very much alive. It is strange how I still come to be here and yet I've not turned into a Ghast.
textByHash.318bd77a9be920c2be3e810e0888554a047e581d: It must be a sign... Yes a sign... I must try to find out what it means. Now, where did I put my journal?
textByHash.c62864869b52b1f51b94f0312cfb9d3a2ff11bc8: My journal! That should help to collect my thoughts.
textByHash.0ee6344a14e6417eafb9295eccf98c51ef57f0e8: It's all coming back to me now. It looks like I came to a violent and bitter end but that's not important now. I just have to figure out what I am going to do now?
textByHash.e450f69236c0e11c3d51bec8e32db9c6faa5773f: Hmm, well you're a poetic one aren't you. Your material world logic stands you in good stead... If you're standing in the material world...
textByHash.4e12fac6cbd99bb2de5e33be7e7ad66267486cf2: In my former incarnation I was Filliman Tarlock, a great druid of some power. I spent many years in this place, which was once a forest and I would wish to protect it as a nature sprit.
textByHash.dc6d177e9526a1726aff9cc56c7941ef3dd0482a: Won't you help me to become a nature spirit? I could really use your help!
textByHash.2e9b9e9a7947d1b0122e70b629f19928b7906198: Will you help me to become a nature spirit? The directions for becoming one are a bit vague, I need three things but I know how to get one of them. Perhaps you can help collect the rest?
textByHash.fc4f05a67224239fbb661ab52ce00ce9a1692b62: Well, the book says, that I need, and I quote:- 'Something with faith', 'something from nature' and 'something of the 'spirit-to-become' freely given'. Hmm, I know how to get something from nature.
textByHash.c52cd6d99ba490e5bd9f40a5289b3101cfc5e7db: Hmm, it does and I could understand if you didn't want to help. However, if you could perhaps at least get the item from nature, that would be a start. Perhaps we can figure out the rest as we go along.
textByHash.871f362d70775723bde2ce12d0e12f42724e5807: This spell needs to be cast in the swamp after you have been blessed. I'm afraid you'll need to go to the temple to the North and ask a member of the clergy to bless you.
textByHash.6a5629e66339ceee7189aa0eea6654cf05609c94: It is required if you're to cast this druid spell. Once you've cast the spell, you should find something from nature. Bring it back to me and then we'll try to figure out the other things we need.
textByHash.f719781e70f0ae22dd671c916758918d976849d0: Oh, hello... Sorry, you've caught me at a bad time, it's just that I've had a sign you see and I need to find my journal.
textByHash.be2038b3fcd607f3a77e0e68bd32e857269f84c5: Well, if I knew that, I wouldn't still be looking for it. However, I do remember something about a knot? Perhaps I was meant to tie a knot or something?
textByHash.30138cd959b35b3f9f7b9ced8c08306bff8bf4e4: Yes, I know, I'm already dead! Thanks for reminding me.
textByHash.73e1e051427bf9e96f82ffceeaefda06f370a28d: Thanks for the journal, I've been reading it. It looks like I came to a violent and bitter end but that's not really important. I just have to figure out what I am going to do now?
textByHash.dca6c761e4dbb40a0a3a4237278c2ac8ae79dd38: Hello there, have you been blessed yet?
textByHash.b6841cf960d730af483579bb8446c68d7252f825: Well, you need to bring 'something from nature', 'something with faith' and 'something of the spirit-to-become freely given.'
textByHash.655ae85887624a2b73b11df26656586b098c7cb7: Hmm, it is a conundrum, however, if you use that Bloom spell I gave you, you should be able to get something from nature. Once you have that, we may be able to puzzle the rest out.
textByHash.b840a39f6ebfb0269c16cc7d211d6871f45cecf6: Did you manage to get something from nature?
textByHash.e53d3f95fe31ddf853d65d7040b3c3eb6e89e4f9: Wonderful, the mushroom represents 'something from nature'. Now we need to work out what the other components of the spell are!
textByHash.634771aed73bc34571a4afdc80c3e233841611db: The three things are: 'Something with faith', 'something from nature' and 'something of the spirit-to-become freely given'.
textByHash.4cc0de5b89e9eeb42300ed6f159a76da1a1d5289: Yes, that's correct, that seems right to me. The other things we need are 'something with faith' and 'something of the spirit-to-become freely given.
textByHash.9af3928e9b03318cd0eed522204a0e4bcd2fe115: I'm sorry my friend, but I do not.
textByHash.a58a50c68618278011a77d531a047ff86d563424: Ah yes, I looked this up. It says,.. 'to arrange upon three rocks around the spirit-to-become...'. Then I must cast a spell. As you can see, I've already placed the rocks. I must have planned to do this before I died!
textByHash.c177b5f1a5fec32b42e1d9c42ad4d3379f3832c0: Well, the only thing the journal says is that 'something with faith stands south of the spirit-to-become', but I'm so confused now I don't really know what that means. Oh, if only I had all my faculties!
textByHash.9a83b7f3f38bc13525f46213585f406188285a8b: Oh really.. Have you placed all the items on the stones? Ok, well, lets try! ~ The druid attempts to cast a spell.~
textByHash.e42070a4f94285ac8a2085a5ff102124b7ba4764: Hmm, something still doesn't seem right. I think we need something more before we can continue.
textByHash.c854d67e02b2afc45bba5dce2a86a9f924941745: I would my friend, but you don't seem to have enough space in your inventory.
textByHash.872de69a27e9ffb40c1a4024f8c599f33840efa5: Sure, but please look after this one.
textByHash.27c72bee1df07a2f96f86654f2988ecaa36d2080: Aha, yes, that seems right well done!
textByHash.99d38eeb055986fef8502c5d09e79225b36076a8: Oh really.. Have you placed all the items on the stones? Ok, well, lets try! ~ The druid attempts to cast a spell.
textByHash.df6482aafcab0a96239509aa7d580ba348eb8220: Aha, everything seems to be in place! You can come through now into the grotto for the final section of my transformation.
textByHash.ef47db461accb2313e95c5e7d15b75f17d28274b: Please come down into the grotto, we have much to discuss.
textByHash.71aadc7f9922bfd55d3416c4c16640c674a5149e: Well, hello there again, I was just enjoying the grotto. Many thanks for your help, I couldn't have become a Spirit of nature without you.
textByHash.b2da23de61464c00c0f7794d6ddafaa235fdb8c8: I must complete the transformation now. Just stand there and watch the show, apparently it's quite good!
textByHash.ec08aab10ae363dcce6556c08301516b6505deda: I would give you the druid pouch, but you don't seem to have enough space in your inventory.
